response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product ownership, cloud platform leadership at scale, or advanced AI education — key requirements for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems design
Active knowledge sharing through workshops and public contributions, demonstrating leadership potential
concerns: No demonstrable AI/ML product or platform built with deep technical ownership
Missing advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in Computer Science only
Limited evidence of strategic cloud AI platform vision or customer advisory experience
